name: dusk-developer-testnet-studio
description: Independent open-source developer cockpit for DuskEVM and DuskDS.

scripts.build: pnpm check:freshness && pnpm --filter @dusk/core build && pnpm --filter @dusk/studio build
scripts.test: vitest run && node scripts/test-public-repository.mjs && node scripts/test-source-freshness.mjs && node scripts/test-source-boundary.mjs && node scripts/test-release-manifest.mjs && node scripts/test-assurance.mjs && node scripts/test-phase5-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-staging-smoke.mjs && node scripts/test-companion-release.mjs && node scripts/test-companion-archive.mjs && node scripts/test-companion-distribution-prototypes.mjs && node scripts/test-standalone-signing-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-standalone-rc-tooling.mjs && node scripts/test-standalone-release-workflow.mjs
scripts.verify:local: pnpm check:boundary && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm check:release && pnpm check:assurance
scripts.test:companion: vitest run packages/local-runtime packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/preflight.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/runBoundedProcess.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/serverSecurity.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/scaffoldTemplate.test.ts && node scripts/test-companion-release.mjs && node scripts/test-companion-archive.mjs
